name: Phase 1: Validate main.py on save
description: When main.py is saved, verify the REPL confirmation gate, error handling, and separation of concerns.

action.message:
The file phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/main.py was just saved. Please review it and verify:
1. The confirmation prompt requires the user to type 'y' or 'yes' — any other input cancels execution.
2. KeyboardInterrupt is caught and handled gracefully (no crash, loop continues).
3. Empty user input is silently ignored (no error, just re-prompt).
4. Plans with zero steps do not attempt execution.
5. main.py contains no direct calls to deepracer_tools functions — all agent logic is delegated to agent.py.
6. Agent creation failure prints a clear error message and exits (does not enter the REPL loop).
7. The welcome message displays the current MODEL name.
Report any violations found.
